---
title: "Reviews"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml" title="Krimler — Reviews" href="https://krimler.github.io/reviews/index.xml">
---

Reader's notes on papers worth reading, written in the spirit of an admiring
colleague. These review external work. Each post links to the original and does not
host it.

[Subscribe to the reviews feed (RSS)](index.xml)
